Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. From birds to brains: My path to the fusiform face area (2024) 33 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. Musician says AI company is cloning her music, filing claims against her 49 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. A tail-call interpreter in (nightly) Rust 115 upvotes, 15 comments
  4. Tracing Goroutines in Realtime with eBPF 58 upvotes, 6 comments
  5. Computational Physics (2nd Edition) 83 upvotes, 11 comments
  6. Nanocode: The best Claude Code that $200 can buy in pure JAX on TPUs 132 upvotes, 22 comments
  7. Scientists Figured Out How Eels Reproduce (2022) 106 upvotes, 22 comments
  8. Perfmon – Consolidate your favorite CLI monitoring tools into a single TUI 40 upvotes, 6 comments
  9. Gemma 4 on iPhone 289 upvotes, 79 comments
  10. Running Gemma 4 locally with LM Studio's new headless CLI and Claude Code 136 upvotes, 34 comments
  11. Eight years of wanting, three months of building with AI 536 upvotes, 167 comments
  12. Music for Programming 59 upvotes, 15 comments
  13. LÖVE: 2D Game Framework for Lua 141 upvotes, 48 comments
  14. Show HN: Contrapunk – Real-time counterpoint harmony from guitar input 110 upvotes, 40 comments
  15. Caveman: Why use many token when few token do trick 648 upvotes, 300 comments
  16. Friendica – A Decentralized Social Network 115 upvotes, 45 comments
  17. A brief history of instant coffee 14 upvotes, 2 comments
  18. Baby's Second Garbage Collector 40 upvotes, 12 comments
  19. Lisette a little language inspired by Rust that compiles to Go 251 upvotes, 129 comments
  20. LibreOffice – Let's put an end to the speculation 140 upvotes, 78 comments
  21. The threat is comfortable drift toward not understanding what you're doing 783 upvotes, 522 comments
  22. Introducing GEN-1 [video] 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  23. Finnish sauna heat exposure induces stronger immune cell than cytokine responses 297 upvotes, 197 comments
  24. UK intelligence censored report on global warming and homeland security 67 upvotes, 37 comments
  25. Microsoft hasn't had a coherent GUI strategy since Petzold 83 upvotes, 48 comments
  26. Artemis II crew see first glimpse of far side of Moon [video] 373 upvotes, 281 comments
  27. The Mechanics of Steins Gate (2023) [pdf] 7 upvotes, 1 comments
  28. The Free Market Lie: Why Switzerland Has 25 Gbit Internet and America Doesn't 93 upvotes, 71 comments
  29. Qwen-3.6-Plus is the first model to break 1T tokens processed in a day 19 upvotes, 11 comments
  30. Hightouch (YC S19) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 7:00am, 6 April 2026. Source here.
